name: Double-Edged Sword
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>脆</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>もろ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>刃</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>は</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>剣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>つるぎ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: You can only control 1 "Double-Edged Sword". The equipped monster gains 2000 ATK, also both players take any battle damage from attacks involving the equipped monster. If you take 2000 or more battle damage: Send this card to the GY.
eff: You can only control 1 "Double-Edged Sword". The equipped monster gains 2000 ATK, also both players take any battle damage from attacks involving the equipped monster. If you take 2000 or more battle damage: Send this card to the GY.

action: Activates if you take battle damage
Sends itself from field to Graveyard
